milestones.title: Memory Core Infrastructure — Session/Soul/User/Storage/Strategy/Provider
milestones.notes: Completed 2026-05-08. 5 tasks: session/soul/user modules, storage refactor, strategy refactor, provider+protocol, integration. 107 memory tests pass. 9 CQR rounds on task 4 (concurrent resume merge, index persistence, monotonic updates).

milestones.title: Memory Tools + CLI Integration — FileWrite/FileEdit/CLI Refactor
